zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice FitzWalter於大約1345年出生在英國艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特時，她的父親John FitzWalter22歲，母親Alianore Percy20歲。她和Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1401年4月29日在英國艾可享年57歲，埋葬在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice FitzWalter于大约1345年出生在英国艾可武德哈姆 沃爾特时，她的父亲John FitzWalter22岁，母亲Alianore Percy20岁。她和Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1401年4月29日在英国艾可享年57岁，埋葬在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice FitzWalter was born about 1345, in Woodham Walter, Essex, England, her father, John FitzWalter, was 22 and her mother, Alianore Percy, was 20. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford. She died on 29 April 1401, in Essex, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice FitzWalter est née environ 1345, à Woodham Walter, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John FitzWalter, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alianore Percy, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford. Elle est décédée le 29 avril 1401, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWalterが約1345年にイギリスエセックスウッドハム ワルターで生まれた時，父John FitzWalterは22歳，母Alianore Percyは20歳であった。彼女はSir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxfordとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1401年4月29日にイギリスエセックスで57歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice FitzWalter(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 에세스 우드함 월터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John FitzWalter(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianore Percy(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1401년 4월 29일 영국 에세스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice FitzWalter родилась около 1345 г. в местности вудхам валтир, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John FitzWalter было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alianore Percy, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford. Она умерла 29 апреля 1401 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия.
